summary: Resolve the installed 7-Zip version from signed Windows file metadata so the exact-installer cleanroom preflight can proceed without weakening tool provenance.

decisions.decision: Read 7-Zip's ProductVersion from the resolved executable's Windows VersionInfo instead of invoking the unsupported --version argument.
decisions.rationale: The no-soak cleanroom wrapper failed closed before any build or Sandbox launch because 7-Zip 26.01 exits nonzero for --version. The installed executable exposes ProductVersion 26.01 through Windows file metadata, which preserves exact tool-version provenance without parsing usage text or accepting a failed command.

decisions.topic: Installed-lifecycle window identity after association activation
decisions.decision: Refresh the installed ScadMill process's MainWindowHandle after the associated-file activation and before moving the window for off-monitor recovery proof.
decisions.rationale: Exact-head CI retained one ScadMill process and the exact associated source, but the previously captured HWND reported the minimized-window sentinel rectangle at 32767,32767 while the process's current main window remained at the restored visible rectangle. Refreshing through Wait-MainWindow binds the move and subsequent persistence oracle to the current GUI window without relaxing any geometry assertion.

decisions.decision: Write and permission the temporary Unix shell fixture under a staging name, then atomically rename it to the executable path consumed by render_project.
decisions.rationale: Exact-head Linux CI reported ExecutableFileBusy while starting the just-written unique fixture, before the malformed-artifact behavior could run. Publishing the closed, permissioned inode through an atomic rename removes the writer/executor name race without retrying product behavior or weakening the captured-log assertion.

testEvidence.criterion: The cleanroom wrapper resolves a nonempty exact 7-Zip version without invoking an unsupported CLI argument.
testEvidence.test: Require the wrapper to use Get-FileProductVersion for 7-Zip and reject regression to Get-ToolVersion, then parse the PowerShell source and inspect the installed executable metadata.

red.command: powershell.exe -NoLogo -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/windows/run-packaged-desktop-evidence.ps1 [exact final-main evidence arguments] -N2SoakMode disabled
red.outcome: RED: the wrapper stopped before build and Sandbox launch with 'Could not resolve 7-Zip version' because 7z.exe --version exits nonzero.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/packaged-desktop-evidence.test.ts -t "fails closed before staging unless a clean HEAD is built at the canonical target" --reporter=default; PowerShell parser check; read 7z.exe VersionInfo.ProductVersion
green.outcome: GREEN: the focused wrapper contract passed, PowerShell parsed without errors, and the resolved 7-Zip file product version was 26.01.

testEvidence.criterion: The off-monitor recovery probe acts on the current installed-app main window after associated-file activation changes window focus or identity.
testEvidence.test: Require a fresh Wait-MainWindow result after the exact associated source is active and before MoveWindow performs the off-monitor persistence probe.

red.command: GitHub Actions Windows setup, run 29975260509, job 89105565725
red.outcome: RED: 8 of 9 CI jobs passed, but installed lifecycle read 32767,32767 from the stale post-association HWND and then observed the current visible window at 137,149 for 74 probes; the process and exact associated editor source remained healthy.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/windows-installer.test.ts -t "binds the Windows installed lifecycle to exact bytes and active WebView state" --reporter=default; PowerShell parser check
green.outcome: GREEN: the focused lifecycle ordering contract passed and the updated PowerShell script parsed without errors.

testEvidence.criterion: The Unix malformed-engine fixture is published only after its contents and execute permission are complete.
testEvidence.test: Atomically rename the staged Unix fixture into its final executable path while retaining the exact malformed-artifact and engine-log assertion.

red.command: GitHub Actions Native checks, run 29975775485, job 89107082384
red.outcome: RED: the unique just-written Unix fixture failed to start with ExecutableFileBusy (Text file busy); the surrounding native tests passed and the product assertion never ran.

green.command: cargo.exe fmt --manifest-path src/native-engine/Cargo.toml -- --check; cargo.exe test --manifest-path src/native-engine/Cargo.toml --test project_runtime preserves_engine_log_when_rendered_artifact_is_malformed -- --exact
green.outcome: GREEN on the host platform: formatting passed and the exact focused malformed-artifact/log-preservation test passed; the Unix-specific atomic publication remains fail-closed in the replacement Linux CI run.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
